examples.sentence: I have to say they have one of the fastest delivery times in the city.
I love the drinks, esp lychee martini, and the food is also VERY good.
The bread is top notch as well.
Food is always fresh and hot- ready to eat!
Did I mention that the coffee is OUTSTANDING?
Had a great experience at Trio ... staff was pleasant; food was tasty and large in portion size - I would highly recommend the portobello/gorgonzola/sausage appetizer and the lobster risotto.
The atmosphere is attractive, but a little uncomfortable.
The sauce may not be for everyone, since it is distintive.
Try the rose roll (not on menu).
While there's a decent menu, it shouldn't take ten minutes to get your drinks and 45 for a dessert pizza.
Anytime and everytime I find myself in the neighborhood I will go to Sushi Rose for fresh sushi and great portions all at a reasonable price.
